name: @slop-ai/claude-agent
description: Claude Agent SDK integration for SLOP — discover and control local applications

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external '@slop-ai/consumer' --external '@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk' --external '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk' --external 'zod' --external 'ws' && bunx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
